chunks.text: Intermittent Network Slowness Today | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar Intermittent Network Slowness Today We are performing firewall load testing today, to help prevent additional incidents as we have seen

help prevent additional incidents as we have seen in the last couple weeks. There will be intermittent moments of poor network performance at the EECS border as this occurs. We are watching closely to insure the interruptions are as few and as brief

o insure the interruptions are as few and as brief as possible. UPDATE [2014-07-14 18:09:35 | Derek Calderon] We have completed the load testing and normal network performance is restored. Resolved as of 2014-07-14 15:28:00 Primary Sidebar IRIS Servi

of 2014-07-14 15:28:00 Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status Outages to campus services are listed at berkeley.statusdashboard.com .
